articles.headline: Anthropic overtakes OpenAI in revenue run rate while securing a major compute deal
articles.summary: Anthropic’s rising revenue run rate and large compute commitment point to intensifying competition in enterprise AI. For businesses, this can signal faster model investment, stronger vendor rivalry, and continued pressure on cloud and inference costs.

articles.headline: China steps up scrutiny of indium exports, raising supply-chain risk for data-center hardware
articles.summary: Reuters reports that Beijing is increasing scrutiny over indium exports, a niche metal used in next-generation data centers and electronics. If expanded into formal export controls, the move could affect hardware supply chains, component availability, and planning for infrastructure-heavy businesses.[4]

articles.headline: China to launch offshore yuan FX trading pilot as it pushes global currency use
articles.summary: China’s plan to expand offshore yuan foreign exchange trading could affect cross-border payment flows, treasury management, and currency risk for firms operating in or trading with China. Businesses exposed to China should watch for changes in settlement options, hedging needs, and capital controls that may influence financing and supply-chain planning.
